description:
Operating Area: Turkey, Greece

GO is a 35.00m / 114ft Motor Superyacht built in 2009 by Dragos Yachts and later underwent a refit in 2021. Sleeping 10 guests in 5 cabins and with a crew of 6. Cruising at 14.00 kn/ph with a top speed of 20.00 kn/ph. The guest cabins comprise a Master cabin, two VIP cabins and two twin cabins, all with ensuite bathroom facilities.

blueprint.name: GO

amenities.label: Electric Bimini Top on Sun Deck

entertainment: LED TV Surround System with DVD Player in Salon

crew.name: Alican Çelik
crew.bio:
Age: 33
Gender: Male
Nationality: Turkish

Captain Alican is an accomplished mariner with over 18 years of experience navigating the seas.His passion for the ocean began in childhood, and it’s been the driving force behind his impressive career. 

Having joined the GO team in 2022, he brings years of expertise as a first captain and deckhand on a variety of yachts, with extensive cruising experience across the Aegean and Marmara
Seas. 

Captain Alican’s focus is not only on ensuring the safety of everyone aboard but also on delivering a well planned, memorable experience for each guest. With a meticulous approach to
yacht management and crew coordination, he takes great pride in making every charter extraordinary. 

Captain Alican speaks intermediate-level English.

crew.name: Alev Kurt
crew.bio:
Age: 41
Gender: Female
Nationality: Turkish

Alev, born in Izmir in 1983, graduated from Nene Hatun Girls' Vocational High School, Department of English Child Development.

She has been working in the tourism industry for over 10 years and has been in the maritime sector for the past 3 years. She has served on various yachts, including the private gulet Way, M/Y Appna, M/Y Paloma Blanca, and
M/Y Le Pacha.

She holds several certifications, including STCW, Security Awareness Certificate, and Personal Survival Techniques at Sea Certificate.

Alev is a disciplined, solution-oriented, friendly, and dedicated team member. Her top priority is providing high-quality service and ensuring guest satisfaction.

She speaks English fluently.

crew.name: Gizem Kocaarslan
crew.bio:
Age: 29
Gender: Female
Nationality: Turkish

Stewardess Gizem was born in 1996 in Mugla. She graduated from the Biology Department of Istanbul University in 2019, has been working in the yachting industry since 2023. She has previously served as a stewardess on the yachts Çınar Yıldızı and North Wind.

Her biggest desire is being a part of a joyful cruise with amazing crew and guests. 

She has certificates like STCW, Medical Examination Certificate for Seafarers, Seaman’s Book and Yacht master 149 GRT (Intern).

She speaks English fluently and Spanish

crew.name: Ramazan Ataklı
crew.bio:
Age: 36
Gender: Male
Nationality: Turkish

Chef: Ramazan Ataklı
Age: 36
Nationality: Turkish

Chef Ramazan’s culinary journey spans 21 years, with a rich background in hospitality and five years specializing in the maritime industry. Initially honing his skills as an executive chef in hotels,

Ramazan now brings his expertise to the sea. His passion for food is matched only by his desire to continually grow and innovate in the kitchen. Ramazan specializes in a variety of cuisines, including Turkish, Mediterranean, Asian, Italian, and Mexican, with a particular flair for Ottoman dishes, hot and cold appetizers, and olive oil-based specialties.

His dedication to excellence and attention to detail ensures that every meal is an experience to savor. 

Chef Ramazan speaks English.

crew.name: Ahmet Mithat Aydogan
crew.bio:
Age: 52
Gender: Male
Nationality: Turkish

Ahmet has been working onboard GO since the beginning of her construction. He is a very experienced engineer and knows the Turkish Coast and the Dodecanese Islands of Greece very well. Before joining the team of GO, he had worked as the engineer onboard a several yachts in Turkey for years.

He has over 29 years of experience in the yachting industry.

crew.name: Caglar Yurttas
crew.bio:
Deckhand Caglar was born in 2000 and started to work on maritime industry in 2014. 
He is a good team player and values collaboration while maintaining individual responsibility and understands how these contribute to the overall operation, maintenance, and guest experience.

He worked on several yachts in different destinations such as Turkey, Greece, Spain, Italy and France and has many certifications like “Basis First Help Education”, “Fire Prevention”, “Navigational Watch Keeping Certificate” etc.

Caglar speaks English.
